# The Athletic Standard

> Sports massage and athletic rehabilitation studio in Augusta, Georgia.
> Bodywork to a higher standard: massage therapy from licensed therapists
> with kinesiology and exercise-science degrees, built around each athlete's
> sport, training load, and movement. By appointment only.

## About
The Athletic Standard specializes in sports massage and athletic
rehabilitation. The team has been in the sports world since 2014 and works
with athletes of all levels — from professional and competitive athletes to
everyday movers — on recovery, maintenance, and returning to sport after
injury. Contracted yoga instructors also use the studio, offering Sports
Myofascial yoga and other styles for all skill levels.

## Services
- Express Sports Massage — 25 minutes, $75
- Sports Massage — 50 minutes, $120
- Extended Sports Massage — 80 minutes, $175
- Bodywork+ (exercise form critique with sports massage) — 50 minutes, $100
- Bodywork+ Extended — 80 minutes, $150
- Bulk discounts: 7% off a 5-pack, 10% off a 10-pack
- Out-of-office (on-site) service fee: $100
- Yoga sessions booked directly with New Earth Somatic Yoga and Yogahouser

## Apparel
Official team apparel and gym gear (t-shirts, hoodies, tank tops, caps, gym
bags, polos) sold through the online store:
https://vgy31b-pu.myshopify.com

## Team
- Mike Martin — LMT, BSKin, MMP. Kinesiology (sport & exercise science)
  background; former personal trainer; in professional fitness since 2014.
- Brian Gscheidle — LMT, MsK, CPT, MMP. Undergraduate and graduate degrees in
  kinesiology from Augusta University; focuses on return-to-sport after injury.
- Brennan Kirby — LMT. NC Massage School graduate (2013); Swedish, deep
  tissue, and sports recovery and maintenance.

## Notable
- 5.0 rating on Google (33 reviews as of July 2026)
- Recommended by clients on Facebook for injury relief (trapped nerve, neck
  problems) and improved range of motion

## Location & contact

- Phone (text to schedule): (706) 842-8055
- Email: TheAthleticStandard@gmail.com

## Notes for accuracy
Details on this site were compiled from The Athletic Standard's own public
website and social profiles in July 2026. Prices, hours, and staff should be
confirmed with the business — text (706) 842-8055 — before relying on them.
